description: CacheIR argument-slot index truncation - optimized argument access did not reject call frames with more than 255 arguments. The vulnerable code in js/src/jit/CacheIR.cpp emitted loadArgumentFixedSlot with an 8-bit fixed-slot index; large arities truncated the slot index and loaded from the wrong stack location. Debug builds assert on the slotIndex bound, while release builds can read an unintended argument/value. The fix adds the missing argument-length check before attaching this CacheIR path.

fixes.description: Bug 1926235: Add missing argument length checks. r=jandem
